final:
// // This module implements a 2-to-1 multiplexer where Y selects input B when SEL is 0
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input SEL,
    output reg Y
);always @(*) begin
        if(SEL == 0) begin
            Y = A;
        end else begin
            Y = B;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 2-to-1 multiplexer where Y selects input B when SEL is 0
